message:
Fix binary content detection for Unicode, sync FTS rowid with commands table, and add regex engine fallback

- Rewrite check_binary_content to count control characters and U+FFFD
  replacement characters instead of non-ASCII bytes, preventing valid
  UTF-8 strings with multibyte characters from being misclassified as
  binary content
- Fix FTS5 insert trigger and rebuild logic to explicitly provide rowid
  matching the commands table id column, ensuring FTS index stays
  synchronized with the source table for correct DELETE/UPDATE behavior
- Add automatic fallback from linear regex engine to backtracking
  (fancy_regex) when the linear engine fails to compile a pattern,
  handling advanced regex features that needs_backtracking_engine()
  doesn't detect

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
